summary: Tested Kontaktformular Module (v41) - All backend APIs (18/18 tests passed). Form submission, webhook, beacon all save to module_kontakt with kontakt_status='Neu' and structured address fields. No data lands in legacy 'anfragen' collection.
seed_data_creation: Test data with 'TEST_' prefix created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Kontaktformular Module fully tested and working. All 3 insert points in webhook.py now use db.module_kontakt instead of db.anfragen. Each insert adds kontakt_status='Neu' and updated_at. The /kontakt/submit endpoint also saves structured address fields (strasse, plz, ort). Database verification confirmed: 11 test entries saved to module_kontakt, 0 entries in legacy anfragen collection.

backend_apis.POST /api/kontakt/submit (basic): PASS - Returns HTML success page, saves to module_kontakt
backend_apis.POST /api/kontakt/submit (with image): PASS - Image upload works, saved to Object Storage
backend_apis.GET /api/kontakt: PASS - Returns inline contact form HTML
backend_apis.GET /api/webhook/contact-beacon (with pa: PASS - Saves data and returns pixel

data_verification.structured_address_fields: PASS - strasse, plz, ort fields saved correctly
data_verification.updated_at: PASS - Timestamp added to all entries

standalone_html_form.status: Correctly configured to submit to API
